message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam packageStyle rectangle

actor "User" as User
participant "executor:AnalysisExecutor" as Executor
participant ":Analysis" as Analysis
participant ":CountryCaseAPIGetter" as CaseGetter
participant ":CountryDeathAPIGetter" as DeathGetter
participant ":CountryPopulationAPIGetter" as PopGetter
participant ":APIInformationGetter" as InfoGetter
database "Covid API" as CovidAPI

User -> Executor : runAnalysis()
activate Executor

opt "At least one country selected for analysis"
    Executor -> Analysis : analyze()
    activate Analysis
    
    alt "[CasesPerCapitaAnalysis]"
        par
            Analysis -> CaseGetter : getCases()
            activate CaseGetter
            CaseGetter -> CaseGetter : getDataURL()
            CaseGetter --> CaseGetter : API Endpoint URL
            CaseGetter -> CovidAPI : API Call
            activate CovidAPI
            CovidAPI --> CaseGetter : API Information
            deactivate CovidAPI
            CaseGetter --> Analysis : Cases in target Countries
            deactivate CaseGetter
            
            Analysis -> PopGetter : getPopulation()
            activate PopGetter
            PopGetter -> PopGetter : getDataURL()
            PopGetter --> PopGetter : API Endpoint URL
            PopGetter -> CovidAPI : API Call
            activate CovidAPI
            CovidAPI --> PopGetter : API Information
            deactivate CovidAPI
            PopGetter --> Analysis : Population of target Countries
            deactivate PopGetter
        end par
    else "[TotalCaseAnalysis]"
        Analysis -> CaseGetter : getCases()
        activate CaseGetter
        CaseGetter -> CaseGetter : getDataURL()
        CaseGetter --> CaseGetter : API Endpoint URL
        CaseGetter -> CovidAPI : API Call
        activate CovidAPI
        CovidAPI --> CaseGetter : API Information
        deactivate CovidAPI
        CaseGetter --> Analysis : Cases in target Countries
        deactivate CaseGetter
    else "[MajorityCasesSexPerCapitaAnalysis]"
        par
            Analysis -> CaseGetter : getMaleCases()
            activate CaseGetter
            CaseGetter -> CaseGetter : getDataURL()
            CaseGetter --> CaseGetter : API Endpoint URL
            CaseGetter -> CovidAPI : API Call
            activate CovidAPI
            CovidAPI --> CaseGetter : API Information
            deactivate CovidAPI
            CaseGetter --> Analysis : Male cases in target Countries
            deactivate CaseGetter
            
            Analysis -> CaseGetter : getFemaleCases()
            note right: A call to the endpoint has already been made so another is not necessary
            CaseGetter --> Analysis : Female cases in target Countries
            
            Analysis -> PopGetter : getMalePopulation()
            activate PopGetter
            PopGetter -> PopGetter : getDataURL()
            PopGetter --> PopGetter : API Endpoint URL
            PopGetter -> CovidAPI : API Call
            activate CovidAPI
            CovidAPI --> PopGetter : API Information
            deactivate CovidAPI
            PopGetter --> Analysis : Male population in target Countries
            deactivate PopGetter
            
            Analysis -> PopGetter : getFemalePopulation()
            note right: A call to the endpoint has already been made so another is not necessary
            PopGetter --> Analysis : Female population in target Countries
        end par
    else "[DeathsPerCapitaAnalysis]"
        par
            Analysis -> DeathGetter : getDeaths()
            activate DeathGetter
            DeathGetter -> DeathGetter : getDataURL()
            DeathGetter --> DeathGetter : API Endpoint URL
            DeathGetter -> CovidAPI : API Call
            activate CovidAPI
            CovidAPI --> DeathGetter : API Information
            deactivate CovidAPI
            DeathGetter --> Analysis : Deaths in target Countries
            deactivate DeathGetter
            
            Analysis -> PopGetter : getPopulation()
            activate PopGetter
            PopGetter -> PopGetter : getDataURL()
            PopGetter --> PopGetter : API Endpoint URL
            PopGetter -> CovidAPI : API Call
            activate CovidAPI
            CovidAPI --> PopGetter : API Information
            deactivate CovidAPI
            PopGetter --> Analysis : Population of target Countries
            deactivate PopGetter
        end par
    end
    deactivate Analysis
end

Analysis --> Executor : Analysis Result
deactivate Executor
Executor --> User : Finish (void)

note bottom of User: Per country analysis results\nare stored for later rendering

@enduml
```
